title: Set a UBI Reminder
description: Set a recurring reminder on your phone so you never miss a daily dUSD claim.

dialogue.text: Want to avoid missing daily UBI claims? Let's set up a recurring reminder on your real phone.
Quick note: DSpace cannot create reminders for you. Open your phone's Clock/Reminders app, make it repeat daily, and label it "Claim dUSD in DSpace".

options.text: Open the UBI claim flow while I set the phone reminder.
Done. Reminder saved on my phone.

dialogue.text: Perfect. When your real-world reminder fires, return to DSpace and run your daily basic-income claim.

options.text: Got it. I'll use my phone reminder.
